# Multi Linear Regression

**Summary**: A statistical method used to model the relationship between a dependent variable and multiple independent variables.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2001-humoud|Humoud, 2001]] used multi-linear-regression to develop a new empirical dewpoint pressure correlation for gas-condensate systems.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The new correlation developed via regression outperformed existing models in both accuracy and consistency across various parameters like acid gas concentration and reservoir temperature. ([[2001-humoud|Humoud, 2001, p. 106]])
